name: ISO/IEC 27701 (PIMS subset)
description: Privacy Information Management — subset for gap analysis demos. Expand with full Annex controls for production.

controls.title: Privacy policy
controls.description: Documented privacy policy aligned with processing purposes.

controls.title: Lawful basis inventory
controls.description: Record lawful bases and purposes for personal data processing.

controls.title: Data subject rights
controls.description: Process for access, erasure, portability, and objection requests.

controls.title: Processor agreements
controls.description: Contracts with processors include privacy and security obligations.

controls.title: Breach notification
controls.description: Privacy incident playbook with regulator/data-subject timelines.

controls.title: Privacy by design
controls.description: DPIA / privacy review for high-risk processing.

controls.title: Retention & disposal
controls.description: Retention schedules and secure disposal of personal data.

controls.title: Cross-border transfers
controls.description: Transfer mechanisms documented for international flows.
